title: 3pc COARSE Classifier Screen Set for Gold Panning Pay Dirt (1/2" 1/8" 1/4" Mesh)

3pc COARSE Classifier Screen Set for Gold Panning Pay Dirt (1/2" 1/8" 1/4" Mesh)

The ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Classifier Screens are a must-have for gold prospecting and mineral recovery. Utilizing our high-impact steel wire classifier sieves is one of the first steps in successful gold prospecting.

The Classifier Soil Sifting Screens will aid your increase the amount of material you can run by separating unwanted coarse raw material into finer, manageable good material ready to wash in your gold pan or run through a sluice box.

Key Features

  • 5 GALLON BUCKET CLASSIFIER SCREEN: Soil sifting pans are designed to interlock and stack on top of each other; will fit on top of a standard 3 or 5 gallon bucket and our 14 inch gold pans; Top Diameter: 13.25", Bottom Diameter: 11"
  • RUGGED WEATHERPROOF DESIGN: Constructed from high-impact durable ABS plastic with 304 stainless steel wire mesh; will not rust or corrode under normal wear
  • CLASSIFIER SIFTING SCREEN SIZE: 1/2", 1/8" , and 1/4"
  • GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT: Classifying your raw material down is imperative for successful gold recovery; sifting out large rocks and soil from your high-yielding pay dirt before working it through your gold pan or sluice box
  • MULTIPURPOSE SIFTING PAN SCREENS: Ideal for many different purposes and a wide range of materials; nothing is off limits with these classifier sifting screens

Product Specifications

  • MPN: GP2-Fine-1517100
  • UPC: 855569007874
  • Color: Green
  • Size: 3 Piece Set - Coarse

Available in 9 different sizes for both fine and coarse material sifting, ensuring you'll be able to properly sift all size material.

Each soil classifying screen will fit over a standard 5 gallon bucket as well as a 14" gold pan and they are stackable, interlocking on top of each other to ensure that they will not slip or slide when used in conjunction with one another.

Proper classification of material by size is the key to more efficient gold separation. This is true for roughing out your material, all the way to the final step of fine gold separation. Using a gold sifter screen is essential for gold panning, sluicing or running a high banking equally well.

Separating and processing your gold concentrates by size with a classifier makes gold recovery much more efficient and less labor intensive, is faster and a more effective, resulting in more gold!
